title: myrsine brownii
intro: Myrsine brownii, also known as the New Zealand matipo, is a plant species belonging to the Myrsinaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Myrsine brownii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it's also used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
